description: Airtable is a cloud platform for building and collaborating on structured data workflows, combining spreadsheet-like tables with relational database features. Users organize records, fields, views, automations, and related workspace content in hosted bases.
summary: Airtable exposes an authenticated REST Web API at `https://api.airtable.com/v0` using bearer tokens (personal access tokens or OAuth access tokens), plus an OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://mcp.airtable.com/mcp` over streamable HTTP.
